decision.summary: Submitted certificate shows alteration signals and requires manual verification.
rationale: Suspected document alteration must not be decided automatically.

requirements.requirement: Product compliance documents must be genuine and externally verifiable.
requirements.notes: Internal visual review found alteration signals; do not disclose fraud language to applicant.

findings.observed_issue: Internal review identified inconsistent fonts, seal placement, and signature rendering across certificate pages.
findings.business_impact: Potentially altered compliance evidence creates serious enforcement and fraud risk.
findings.required_action: Escalate for manual issuer verification and retain fraud indicators in internal notes only.
findings.acceptable_evidence: Direct issuer verification or replacement report transmitted by accredited issuer.

missing_materials.why_required: Document authenticity cannot be confirmed automatically.
missing_materials.acceptable_replacement: Issuer-confirmed report or direct registry verification.

evidence.extracted_fact: Submitted report image has low extraction confidence and visual inconsistency signals.

remediation.applicant_message: 该检测报告需要进一步人工核验。请提供由签发机构直接出具或可在线核验的报告文件。

sensitive_data_notes: Internal fraud indicators should not be included in applicant-facing text.

disclaimer: Operational qualification review only; not legal advice.
